name: BALCHEM CORP
business: Balchem Corporation develops, manufactures, distributes and markets specialty performance ingredients and products for the nutritional, food, pharmaceutical, animal health, plant nutrition, sterilization, fumigation, and industrial markets. Its three reportable segments are Human Nutrition and Health, Animal Nutrition and Health, and Specialty Products.
sellsTo: nutritional, food, pharmaceutical, animal health, plant nutrition, sterilization, fumigation, and industrial markets
contract sterilizers and medical device manufacturers

exposures.sentence: We develop, manufacture, distribute and market specialty performance ingredients and products for the nutritional, food, pharmaceutical, animal health, plant nutrition, sterilization, fumigation, and industrial markets.

Ethylene oxide is sold as a sterilant gas, primarily for use in the health care industry. It is used to sterilize a wide range of medical devices because of its versatility and effectiveness in treating hard or soft surfaces, composites, metals, tubing and different types of plastics without negatively impacting the performance of the device being sterilized.
The Company's micronutrient agricultural nutrition business sells chelated minerals primarily to producers of high value crops.

catalysts.event: European Commission definitive anti-dumping duties on choline chloride from China
catalysts.sentence: On December 19, 2025, the European Commission published their final decision to set definitive duties between 90.0% and 115.9%.

catalysts.event: EPA Interim Decision on ethylene oxide re-registration
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, the EPA issued its Interim Decision ( ID ) whereby EtO was re-registered for the sterilization of medical devices and the reduction of microbes on certain spices/seasonings.

Capital expenditures are projected to range from $40,000 to $45,000 for 2026, including our continued efforts to invest in energy and water saving projects, while exploring additional renewable energy opportunities in supporting our future growth and capacities.
